since_last: 43% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.92%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 43% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.92% · Gold -0.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 43% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.92%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.92%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.38%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -5.86%
cards.body: Leaders: BIDU +3.07%, AVAV +2.67%, WDAY +2.15%, NOW +1.88%, GOOGL +1.88%. Laggards: SKHY -5.86%, ARM -4.61%, TSM -3.88%, DELL -3.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.36% at $135.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
